office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent David Stuebe faces community advocate Diana H. Perez.

candidates.summary: Stuebe is an incumbent representative, Washougal mayor, Army veteran, and former law-enforcement officer.
highlights: Emphasizes public safety, veterans, transportation, affordability, tax restraint, and accountable government [S2].

spending.basis: He emphasizes accountable government without a detailed spending proposal.

safety.basis: He has law-enforcement experience and explicitly emphasizes public safety.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent representative and mayor with prior law-enforcement experience.

candidates.summary: Perez is a community advocate and repeat legislative candidate emphasizing health care, housing, education, reproductive rights, and environmental protection.
highlights: Supports reproductive rights and environmental protection [S2].

experience.basis: She is a repeat candidate and community advocate with no documented elected tenure.
